attributes.name: Monitor Battery State of Health
attributes.description: The BMS shall continuously monitor cell voltages, temperatures, and internal resistance to estimate remaining useful life and detect degradation patterns.
attributes.actor: BMS Controller, Vehicle ECU, Cloud Analytics

attributes.name: Thermal Runaway Prevention
attributes.description: The BMS shall detect abnormal thermal conditions and trigger cooling, power reduction, or emergency disconnect to prevent cell thermal runaway.
attributes.actor: BMS Controller, Thermal Management System, Emergency Shutdown

attributes.name: Optimize Charging Profile
attributes.description: The BMS shall adapt charging current and voltage based on cell temperature, SOC, and manufacturer limits to maximize charge speed while preserving longevity.

attributes.name: Normal Driving - SOH Monitoring
attributes.description: During normal highway driving at 70mph, the BMS samples cell voltages every 100ms, temperatures every 500ms, and computes SOH drift every 60s. If SOH drops below 80%, a maintenance alert is queued.
attributes.precondition: Vehicle powered on, pack temperature 15-35°C, SOC 20-90%
attributes.postcondition: SOH estimate updated, no alerts if SOH > 80%
attributes.steps: 1. Initialize ADC sampling loop | 2. Read 96 cell voltages | 3. Read 24 temperature sensors | 4. Compute impedance spectrum | 5. Update SOH Kalman filter | 6. Check threshold | 7. Log or alert

attributes.name: Fast Charging - Thermal Derating
attributes.description: Driver initiates 350kW fast charge at 10% SOC. BMS starts at max current, then progressively derates as cell temperatures approach 45°C, balancing charge speed against thermal limits.
attributes.precondition: Charger connected, CCS protocol active, pack temp < 40°C
attributes.postcondition: Charge complete or thermal limit reached, log maintained
attributes.steps: 1. Negotiate charge profile with charger | 2. Begin 350kW charge | 3. Monitor max cell temp every 1s | 4. At 42°C, reduce current 10% | 5. At 45°C, reduce current 25% | 6. At 50°C, emergency stop | 7. Report session data

attributes.name: Thermal Runaway Detection & Response
attributes.description: Cell 17 vents gas and temperature spikes to 85°C within 3 seconds. BMS detects the anomaly, isolates the module, activates suppression, and notifies occupants via VCU.
attributes.precondition: Pack operational, vent detection sensors armed
attributes.postcondition: Affected module isolated, suppression active, occupants notified
attributes.steps: 1. Temp sensor T-17 reads 85°C (threshold: 60°C) | 2. Vent sensor V-17 triggers | 3. BMS flags thermal event in < 100ms | 4. Open contactors for Module 3 | 5. Activate aerosol suppression | 6. Send CAN message to VCU | 7. VCU activates hazard lights + cabin alert | 8. Log incident for forensic analysis

attributes.name: Cell Voltage Sampling Rate
attributes.text: The BMS shall sample each cell voltage at a minimum rate of 10 Hz with 16-bit resolution and ±1mV accuracy.

attributes.name: Thermal Runaway Response Time
attributes.text: The BMS shall detect a thermal runaway event and initiate module isolation within 100 milliseconds of the threshold breach.

attributes.name: SOC Estimation Accuracy
attributes.text: The BMS shall estimate State of Charge with an accuracy of ±2% across the operational temperature range of -20°C to +60°C.

attributes.name: Charging Current Derating
attributes.text: The BMS shall reduce charging current by 10% when any cell temperature exceeds 42°C, and by 25% when any cell exceeds 45°C.

attributes.name: Emergency Shutdown Isolation
attributes.text: The BMS shall open all contactors and disconnect the HV bus within 50ms of receiving an emergency shutdown command.

attributes.name: Sample Cell Voltages
attributes.description: Periodically read voltage from all series cells via isoSPI daisy-chain

attributes.name: Estimate SOC/SOH
attributes.description: Run extended Kalman filter combining voltage, current, and temperature to estimate state

attributes.name: Thermal Management Control
attributes.description: Command cooling system and derate power based on thermal state

attributes.name: Contactor Control
attributes.description: Open/close HV contactors based on safety interlocks and charge state

attributes.name: BMS Master Controller
attributes.description: Main processing unit running estimation and control algorithms

attributes.name: Cell Monitoring Unit
attributes.description: isoSPI-based ASIC measuring 12-16 cells per module

attributes.name: HV Contactors
attributes.description: High-voltage relays for pack connect/disconnect

attributes.name: Thermal Management System
attributes.description: Liquid cooling loop with pump, chiller, and plate heat exchangers

attributes.name: Autonomous Search Pattern Execution
attributes.description: The UAV shall execute a predefined search pattern (lawn-mower, spiral, or sector) over a GPS-defined area while maintaining altitude and avoiding obstacles.
attributes.actor: Ground Control Station, Autopilot, Camera Payload

attributes.name: Person Detection & Geolocation
attributes.description: The UAV shall detect humans in camera feed using onboard ML, estimate their GPS coordinates, and stream annotated video to GCS.
attributes.actor: Camera Payload, AI Coprocessor, GCS Operator

attributes.name: Emergency Return to Base
attributes.description: On low battery, communication loss, or critical system fault, the UAV shall abort mission and return to launch point autonomously.

attributes.name: Mountain Search - Lawn Mower Pattern
attributes.description: UAV deployed at 2000m elevation to search 2km² avalanche zone. Flies 100m AGL at 15m/s with 80m track spacing. EO/IR camera captures 4K video at 30fps. ML person-detection runs at 5Hz.
attributes.precondition: GPS lock, battery > 60%, weather VMC, GCS link established
attributes.postcondition: Area covered, detections logged, video archived
attributes.steps: 1. Receive search area polygon from GCS | 2. Generate lawn-mower waypoints | 3. Climb to 100m AGL | 4. Execute pattern at 15m/s | 5. Run person detection on every 5th frame | 6. On detection, loiter for 10s, capture burst | 7. Stream geo-tagged detection to GCS | 8. Return on completion or battery < 25%

attributes.name: Lost Link - RTL Triggered
attributes.description: UAV flying search pattern loses GCS comms at 8km range. After 15s comms timeout, autopilot triggers Return-to-Launch, climbs to safe altitude, and flies direct path home while avoiding terrain.
attributes.precondition: Mission in progress, GPS valid, home position recorded
attributes.postcondition: UAV landed at home point, mission aborted, log complete
attributes.steps: 1. GCS heartbeat timeout detected at T+0 | 2. Retry link 3 times over 15s | 3. Trigger RTL mode at T+15s | 4. Climb to RTL altitude (120m AGL) | 5. Compute direct path to home | 6. Query terrain database for obstacles | 7. Fly home at cruise speed | 8. Descend and land at home point | 9. Attempt GCS reconnect on ground

attributes.name: Navigation Accuracy
attributes.text: The UAV shall maintain position within 3 meters CEP during autonomous waypoint navigation using GPS/INS fusion.

attributes.name: Person Detection Rate
attributes.text: The onboard person detection model shall achieve a true positive rate of ≥ 95% and false positive rate of ≤ 2% for upright humans at ranges of 50-200m.

attributes.name: Comms Loss RTL Timeout
attributes.text: The autopilot shall initiate Return-to-Launch within 15 seconds of losing the GCS heartbeat.

attributes.name: Terrain Avoidance
attributes.text: The UAV shall maintain a minimum clearance of 50 meters above ground level at all times during autonomous flight.

attributes.name: Waypoint Navigation
attributes.description: Follow sequence of GPS waypoints with PID control on position and velocity

attributes.name: Person Detection Inference
attributes.description: Run YOLO/SSD model on camera frames to detect humans

attributes.name: Terrain Following
attributes.description: Adjust altitude based on terrain database and radar altimeter

attributes.name: Flight Controller
attributes.description: Pixhawk-class autopilot with ARM Cortex-M7

attributes.name: AI Coprocessor
attributes.description: NVIDIA Jetson onboard GPU for real-time inference

attributes.name: Gimballed EO/IR Camera
attributes.description: Dual-sensor payload with 3-axis stabilization

attributes.name: Deliver Controlled Medication Dose
attributes.description: The infusion pump shall deliver a clinician-programmed volume of medication at a specified rate, with automatic flow adjustment based on occlusion sensing.

attributes.name: Detect and Alarm on Occlusion
attributes.description: The pump shall detect upstream and downstream occlusions within 2 minutes and trigger audible/visual alarms while stopping infusion.

attributes.name: Post-Op Morphine Infusion
attributes.description: Patient recovering from surgery requires 2mg/hr morphine via IV for 24 hours. Clinician programs pump at bedside. Pump runs continuously, logs every bolus, and alarms if line kinks.
attributes.precondition: Patient admitted, IV line patent, pump calibrated
attributes.postcondition: 24hr infusion complete, log uploaded to EMR
attributes.steps: 1. Clinician enters 2mg/hr on pump UI | 2. Pump verifies drug library match | 3. Start infusion at programmed rate | 4. Monitor upstream pressure every 10s | 5. Monitor downstream pressure every 10s | 6. Log cumulative dose every minute | 7. On occlusion, alarm within 2min and stop | 8. At 24hr, stop and prompt clinician

attributes.name: Air-in-Line Detection
attributes.description: During routine infusion, a 0.5mL air bubble enters the line. The ultrasonic air-in-line sensor detects it within 50ms and triggers immediate pump stop + high-priority alarm.
attributes.postcondition: Pump stopped, alarm active, clinician notified
attributes.steps: 1. Air bubble passes ultrasonic sensor | 2. Sensor detects > 50µL air | 3. Signal crosses threshold in < 50ms | 4. Motor driver receives stop command | 5. Pump halts within 100ms | 6. Red alarm LED flashes | 7. Audible alarm at 85dB | 8. Message displayed: 'AIR IN LINE' | 9. Log event with timestamp

attributes.name: Flow Rate Accuracy
attributes.text: The pump shall deliver fluid within ±5% of the programmed rate across the range of 0.1 mL/hr to 1200 mL/hr.

attributes.name: Air-in-Line Detection Sensitivity
attributes.text: The pump shall detect air bubbles of 50 µL or greater and stop infusion within 100 milliseconds.

attributes.name: Drug Library Verification
attributes.text: The pump shall verify that programmed dose and concentration match the hospital drug library before starting infusion.

attributes.name: Control Motor Speed
attributes.description: Drive peristaltic or syringe mechanism at precise rate

attributes.name: Detect Air in Line
attributes.description: Ultrasonic sensing for bubbles in IV tubing

attributes.name: Verify Drug Parameters
attributes.description: Cross-check dose against institutional drug library

attributes.name: Pump Motor Assembly
attributes.description: Brushless DC motor with encoder feedback

attributes.name: Ultrasonic Air Sensor
attributes.description: Piezoelectric transducer pair for bubble detection

attributes.name: Main Control Board
attributes.description: ARM Cortex-M4 with safety-certified RTOS

attributes.name: Autonomous Inventory Transport
attributes.description: The warehouse robot shall navigate between storage racks, pick pallets from designated locations, and deliver them to packing stations without human intervention.

attributes.name: Dynamic Obstacle Avoidance
attributes.description: The robot shall detect and avoid humans, forklifts, and dropped objects in real-time while maintaining throughput targets.
attributes.actor: Robot Fleet, Safety System, Floor Workers

attributes.name: Peak Hour - 100 Pallets/Hour
attributes.description: During Black Friday fulfillment, 20 robots operate simultaneously. WMS dispatches pick missions every 36 seconds. Robots coordinate via fleet manager to avoid congestion at choke points.
attributes.precondition: Fleet online, WMS connected, charging stations available
attributes.postcondition: 100 pallets moved within 1 hour, zero collisions
attributes.steps: 1. WMS queues 100 pick missions | 2. Fleet manager assigns missions to robots | 3. Each robot plans path with A* | 4. Dynamic speed adjustment at intersections | 5. Lidar scans for obstacles at 10Hz | 6. On human detection, reduce to 0.3 m/s | 7. Pick pallet via fork mechanism | 8. Navigate to packing station | 9. Drop and return to staging

attributes.name: Emergency Stop - Human in Path
attributes.description: Robot carrying 500kg pallet detects a worker who stepped into the lane. Lidar + camera fusion confirms human at 3m. Robot initiates emergency brake and sounds alarm.
attributes.precondition: Robot moving at 1.5 m/s, safety systems armed
attributes.postcondition: Robot stopped, worker safe, supervisor notified
attributes.steps: 1. Lidar detects object at 3m ahead | 2. Camera classifies as human (confidence 99.2%) | 3. Safety PLC receives STOP signal | 4. Motor controllers apply max braking | 5. Robot decelerates from 1.5 to 0 m/s in 1.2m | 6. Amber beacon flashes | 7. Horn sounds at 90dB | 8. Alert sent to supervisor tablet | 9. Robot waits for all-clear signal

attributes.name: Navigation Position Accuracy
attributes.text: The robot shall navigate to within ±10mm of target positions in the warehouse grid.

attributes.name: Emergency Stop Distance
attributes.text: The robot shall come to a complete stop within 2 meters when traveling at maximum speed and an obstacle is detected.

attributes.name: Fleet Throughput
attributes.text: The robot fleet shall sustain a throughput of 100 pallet moves per hour during peak operation.

attributes.name: Plan Optimal Path
attributes.description: Compute shortest-time path considering fleet congestion

attributes.name: Detect Obstacles
attributes.description: Fusion of Lidar, camera, and ultrasonic for obstacle classification

attributes.name: Lift and Transport Pallet
attributes.description: Actuate fork mechanism to pick and place pallets

attributes.name: AMR Drive Base
attributes.description: Differential drive chassis with LiFePO4 battery pack

attributes.name: Lidar Sensor Array
attributes.description: 270° 2D Lidar for SLAM and obstacle detection

attributes.name: Safety PLC
attributes.description: IEC 61508 SIL-2 rated safety controller

attributes.name: Cell Voltage
attributes.description: Individual cell terminal voltage measured by CMU

attributes.name: Pack Temperature
attributes.description: Max cell temperature across the module array

attributes.name: Pack Current
attributes.description: Total HV bus current (charge negative, discharge positive)

attributes.name: State of Charge
attributes.description: Estimated SOC from extended Kalman filter

attributes.name: State of Health
attributes.description: Estimated capacity fade relative to nominal

attributes.name: Cooling Command
attributes.description: Commanded pump duty cycle from thermal management

attributes.name: Contactor State
attributes.description: HV bus contactor open/closed status

attributes.name: GPS Position
attributes.description: Fused GPS/INS position (lat, lon, alt)

attributes.name: Waypoint List
attributes.description: Ordered list of GPS waypoints for current mission

attributes.name: Camera Frame
attributes.description: 4K EO/IR video frame from gimbal payload

attributes.name: Person Detections
attributes.description: Bounding boxes and confidence scores from ML inference

attributes.name: Altitude Command
attributes.description: Target altitude commanded by terrain-following function

attributes.name: Terrain Height
attributes.description: Terrain elevation from database or radar altimeter

attributes.name: Flow Rate Command
attributes.description: Clinician-programmed infusion rate

attributes.name: Motor Speed
attributes.description: Peristaltic motor shaft speed with encoder feedback

attributes.name: Upstream Pressure
attributes.description: Line pressure upstream of pump head for occlusion detection

attributes.name: Air-in-Line Detection
attributes.description: Ultrasonic bubble detection flag (> 50 µL threshold)

attributes.name: Drug Parameters
attributes.description: Programmed drug name, concentration, and dose rate from UI

attributes.name: Verification Status
attributes.description: Drug library cross-check result: pass/fail

attributes.name: Target Position
attributes.description: WMS-assigned pick or drop location in warehouse grid

attributes.name: Fleet State
attributes.description: Positions and statuses of all AMRs from fleet manager

attributes.name: Path Plan
attributes.description: Ordered waypoint sequence computed by path planner

attributes.name: Lidar Scan
attributes.description: 270° 2D point cloud from Lidar sensor array at 10 Hz

attributes.name: Obstacle Map
attributes.description: Classified obstacle grid (human / forklift / object) from sensor fusion

attributes.name: Fork Command
attributes.description: Lift/lower/extend command to fork mechanism actuator

attributes.name: Fork Status
attributes.description: Fork position feedback: idle / raising / lowering / extended
